title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!
